positive: A clean, highly stylized graphic illustration of a majestic mountain range silhouette set against a vibrant, swirling nebula sky. The composition must be perfectly centered and symmetrical, utilizing strong, bold geometry and clean lines. Include celestial elements such as minimalist crescent moons and radiating constellations. Style should evoke vintage Art Deco and Mid-Century Modern poster art, characterized by flat planes of color, high contrast, and limited but saturated color palette (deep sapphire, burnt orange, teal, and stark white). The overall feeling should be epic yet stylized, optimized for single-color or two-color printing on apparel.
negative: photo, realistic, blurry, fuzzy, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, logo, clutter, low resolution, bad anatomy, extra limbs, deformities, noise, sketch, grayscale, dirty
